subjectLines: Tiktok tip: how to measure tiktok performance
Practical guide: How to Measure TikTok Performance
New Learn guide — how to measure tiktok performance
previewText: Prioritize average watch time, completion, traffic sources, and follower conversion from…
intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How to Measure TikTok Performance. Prioritize average watch time, completion, traffic sources, and follower conversion from video views. Avoid judging success by a single viral spike.
mainSummary: Prioritize average watch time, completion, traffic sources, and follower conversion from video views. Avoid judging success by a single viral spike.
